---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for VAP2D
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: sametkaya
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear description of the problem or limitation. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Use case**
Who would benefit and in what workflow (e.g. batch processing, retraining on a new modality, integration into a pipeline)?

**Additional context**
Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
